scripts.build: bun build src/main.js --outdir ../internal/embed/static/dist --minify && bun build src/main.css --outdir ../internal/embed/static/dist --asset-naming '[name]-[hash].[ext]' --minify
scripts.dev: bun build src/main.js --outdir ../internal/embed/static/dist --watch & bun build src/main.css --outdir ../internal/embed/static/dist --asset-naming '[name]-[hash].[ext]' --watch
